description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, round head and long, straight silver-gray hair that extends past its shoulders, ending in black tips. The doll has a pale face with oversized black eyes, thick black eyebrows, and no visible mouth, giving it a striking, cartoonish appearance. It wears a red coat with gold cuffs and white trim, paired with brown boots and a white cravat, evoking a formal or historical European fashion. The hands are small and yellow, with the arms slightly bent outward. The back of the doll features a small ponytail tied at the nape, and the coat is decorated with a yellow and white pattern on the lower back. The overall design is simple yet bold, with clean lines and a matte finish.
description: A stylized doll with long silver-gray hair, a red coat with gold accents, and large black eyes, featuring a formal, cartoonish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's large black eyes, thick eyebrows, red coat with gold cuffs, and long silver-gray hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the hair's length and black tips, the side of the red coat, and the small ponytail at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full ponytail, the yellow and white pattern on the back of the coat, and the symmetrical fall of the hair.
description_view_3: Right rear three-quarter view showing the hair's length, the side of the face with one visible eye, and the coat's side details.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a red, long-sleeved coat with gold cuffs and white trim, reminiscent of 18th-century European formal wear, paired with a white cravat and brown boots. The back of the coat features a yellow and white decorative pattern.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly bent outward at the sides, legs straight and close together, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with large, round black eyes, thick black eyebrows angled downward, and no visible mouth, giving a serious or intense look.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight silver-gray hair with black tips, parted to the side and extending past the shoulders, with a small ponytail tied at the back.
